name: @dev-weiqi/sniffer
description: Self-hosted Flipper alternative: local daemon + web UI to monitor and mock an app's HTTP & Socket traffic.

scripts.test:unit: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node build/test/doctor.test.js && node build/test/adb.test.js && node build/test/api.test.js && node build/test/entryStore.test.js && node build/test/http.test.js && node build/test/mockStore.test.js && node build/test/png.test.js && node build/test/static.test.js && node build/test/testHandlers.test.js
scripts.coverage: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && c8 --all --src build/test --include "build/test/doctor.js" --include "build/test/adb.js" --include "build/test/api.js" --include "build/test/entryStore.js" --include "build/test/http.js" --include "build/test/mockStore.js" --include "build/test/png.js" --include "build/test/static.js" --include "build/test/testHandlers.js" --check-coverage --lines 100 --statements 100 --functions 100 --reporter=text --reporter=json-summary --reporter=lcov --reports-dir coverage node --input-type=module -e "await import('./build/test/doctor.test.js'); await import('./build/test/adb.test.js'); await import('./build/test/api.test.js'); await import('./build/test/entryStore.test.js'); await import('./build/test/http.test.js'); await import('./build/test/mockStore.test.js'); await import('./build/test/png.test.js'); await import('./build/test/static.test.js'); await import('./build/test/testHandlers.test.js')"
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm --prefix ../ui run build && rm -rf ui-dist && cp -R ../ui/dist ui-dist
